race.name: UCI Gran Fondo Brasil – Pomerode
race.tagline: South America's Premier UCI Gran Fondo Qualifier in Germany-Heritage Santa Catarina

climate.description: Early November in Santa Catarina typically features mild spring weather with moderate temperatures and variable precipitation. Specific meteorological data for race day conditions not available in sources.

terrain.surface: Looped road course featuring rolling hills, winding roads, and scenic views of Santa Catarina. The route combines two significant climbs with a southern loop return, offering varied terrain suitable for endurance cyclists.
features: Looped road course featuring rolling hills, winding roads, and scenic views of Santa Catarina
The route combines two significant climbs with a southern loop return, offering varied terrain suitable for endurance cyclists

fondo_rating.scoring_notes: Migrated from gravel-race-automation. Original score: 70. adventure dimension dropped, road_surface added. Score recalculated: 67.

course_description.character: Looped road course combining rolling hills, winding roads, and two distinct climbing sections. Starts and finishes in Pomerode's historic center with full UCI road signage and fan-friendly setup. Shared route between Gran Fondo and Mediofondo, with Mediofondo taking a shortcut halfway.
course_description.signature_challenge: The 7 km mid-course climb at 4% average gradient reaching 400 m elevation, positioned as the race's decisive section where performance gaps typically emerge.
suffering_zones: Initial 4 km climb from sea level to ~300 m (repeated after 24 km on return leg)
Mid-course 7 km climb at 4% average gradient to day's highest point (~400 m), most demanding section
Southern loop return to finish with accumulated fatigue

logistics.airport: NAV (Navegantes Airport), 83km; FLN (Florianópolis Airport), 190km; CWB (Curitiba Airport), 200km; GRU (Guarulhos International Airport (São Paulo)), 640km
logistics.lodging_strategy: Pomerode and surrounding Vale Europeu Catarinense region offer lodging options; specific properties not detailed in sources.
logistics.transport: Event held in Pomerode's historic center with full expo and kit pickup November 7–8. Multiple regional airports serve the Vale Europeu Catarinense. UCI license, valid ID, and personal insurance required for entry.

history.origin_story: UCI Gran Fondo Brasil – Pomerode is the third edition of South America's first and only UCI Gran Fondo World Series event, established to bring UCI-sanctioned gran fondo racing to the continent. Held in the Vale Europeu Catarinense region, a German-heritage area named after Pomerania, the event leverages local cycling culture and European architectural charm.
notable_moments: 2023: Inaugural edition launched as South America's first UCI Gran Fondo World Series qualifier
2024: Second edition reinforced event's status as flagship South American gran fondo
2025: Third edition held November 9 with 3,000+ participants across three editions from 20+ countries
Top 25% finishers in age categories qualify for 2026 UCI Gran Fondo World Championships

biased_opinion.summary: Granfondo Pomerode represents a landmark event for South American cycling, offering the continent's only UCI Gran Fondo World Series qualifier with genuine championship stakes. The German-heritage setting and well-organized course deliver a premium experience, though the event's relative youth (founded 2023) and limited international profile compared to European counterparts position it as an emerging rather than established prestige event. Best suited for cyclists seeking UCI qualification, South American cycling tourism, or cultural immersion in Brazil's cycling heartland.

final_verdict.one_liner: South America's sole UCI Gran Fondo World Series qualifier, combining championship-level racing with German-Brazilian cultural heritage in a professionally organized, moderately challenging 120 km loop.
final_verdict.should_you_race: UCI Gran Fondo Brasil – Pomerode delivers authentic UCI-sanctioned gran fondo racing to South America with a clear qualification pathway to the 2026 World Championships. The 120 km course offers balanced climbing (1,239 m elevation) across two distinct sections, supported by scenic Vale Europeu Catarinense terrain and German-influenced architecture. Event organization meets UCI standards with expo, kit pickup, full signage, and athlete support. The Mediofondo option (80 km, 809 m) accommodates older age categories. Participation requires UCI license and personal insurance. As the region's only World Series event, it attracts international competitors but remains less established than European gran fondos. Ideal for cyclists prioritizing championship qualification, South American cycling culture, or European-style cycling in a developing market.

videos.description:
05 de Novembro de 2023 - Pomerode.SC

O UCI Gran Fondo Brasil chega na cidade mais alemã do Brasil para um evento clássico do ciclismo mundial.

Confira como foi o evento e prepare-se para 03 de Novembro de 2024.

videos.title: Gran Fondo Pomerode - Não acredito que isso aconteceu!
videos.description:
E ai Ciclistas! Tudo bem com vocês?
É isso ai galera, prova concluída e com muitas emoções, foi sensacional!
A prova em si foi bem organizada, o local, Pomerode - SC, tem um diferencial muito grande por ser uma cidade turística e com paisagens incríveis ao redor, e isso tornou a corrida ainda mais especial. Foi dura por ter uma altimetria mais intensa mas foi justamente as áreas de paralelepípedo que quebraram mais, ao mesmo tempo, ofereceu um diferencial para ciclistas com outro nível de técnica, quase um Roubaix.
Mas o mais incrível foi a surpresa final, bom, assiste e me diz o que achou e se você participou ou participaria.

Curte! Se inscreve! Compartilha! E me conta a sua experiência!

#granfondo #ciclismo #estrada #roadbike #competicao

Apresentando a Dataro Sports:

Fundada com a rica herança do Clube Dataro de Ciclismo, um dos mais renomados clubes do Brasil desde 2001, a Dataro Sports celebra conquistas como campeonatos brasileiros, pan-americanos e muitas outras vitórias ciclísticas. Esta loja foi criada pensando em você, amante das duas rodas, seja você iniciante ou veterano.

Escolhemos cada produto com cuidado, pensando apenas no que realmente acreditamos. Visite-nos em Curitiba, na Rua Equador 198, Bairro Bacacheri, ou explore nossa loja online: Dataro Sports. www.datarosports.com.br 

Nossa Missão: Aproximá-lo de sua paixão, facilitando sua jornada com a bicicleta e entregando os melhores produtos no menor tempo possível.
Nossa Visão: Ser reconhecida entre as melhores lojas e webstores do Brasil, destacando-se pela excelência em produtos e serviços esportivos.
Nossos Valores: Priorizamos a comunicação transparente, a responsabilidade, a confiança e, acima de tudo, a satisfação de nossos clientes.
